reviews.comment:
Regular menos!!  Mediocre atención. No te dejan usar las duchas asi pagues y todo. Los baños mediopelo y los precios de la comida como en el Sheraton.
Comparada con buenas estaciones ypf del país está muy ⬇️ abajo. Recomiendo seguir de largo....

(Translated by Google)
Average! Mediocre service. They don't let you use the showers even if you pay. The bathrooms are mediocre, and the food prices are like those at the Sheraton.
Compared to good YPF resorts in the country, it's very ⬇️ low. I recommend passing by....
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSNy16dmh3RRAB
